summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lineup Admin Dashboard with three new features: Date Range Filter, CSV Export, and Responsive Sidebar. Backend APIs work perfectly (100% pass rate). Frontend renders correctly but has dropdown interaction issues due to overlay elements.

ui_bugs.issue: Preset buttons in dropdown not clickable due to overlay interception
ui_bugs.details: Dropdown opens correctly and all presets are visible, but clicking is blocked by overlay elements with z-index issues

ui_bugs.issue: Export option buttons may have similar overlay click interception issues
ui_bugs.details: Export dropdown opens but interaction testing was limited due to similar overlay issues as date filter

passed_tests: All analytics endpoints with real data
Date range filtering on all backend endpoints
Dashboard loading with correct KPI data
All charts rendering (User Growth, Sessions Trend, Sports Distribution, Session Status, Venue Popularity)
Date filter button and dropdown UI presence
Export CSV button and dropdown UI presence
Responsive sidebar behavior (mobile hamburger menu, desktop always-visible)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown interaction issues in DateRangeFilter and ExportButtons components - likely z-index or overlay click handling problems preventing preset selection and export option clicks
